def negative_per_item_copy_of_large_config_or_context_object():
    rule_id = "per_item_copy_of_large_config_or_context_object"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that copy large config or context structures for each item despite read-mostly behavior."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
